svg.text: If: intent ∈ {EMAIL, VAULT, SHELL, RAG, PHONE, CALL, SMS} OR PII detected
Then: Force Ollama (qwen2.5:1.5b) — NEVER cloud, privacy first
All cloud routes blocked by PII check
💾 TIER 2: Context Fingerprint Cache (30 min TTL)
Hash: MD5(intent + last_5_queries + user_params) → check cache
If match: return cached response | If miss: continue to TIER 3
🔄 TIER 3: Provider Routing Chain (by task type)
LOCAL ONLY: Ollama (qwen2.5:1.5b) — no fallback, no cloud
smart_router.py:ROUTING_CHAINS dict | provider selection logic lines 140-200
3 failures → OPEN (60s cooldown) | 1 success → CLOSED | timeout → OPEN
📊 TIER 5: Daily Rate Limits & Fallback Chain
If limit hit: try next provider in chain | Chain exhausted: fallback Ollama
[6] OUTPUT LAYER — HITL GATE & RESPONSE DELIVERY
Risky ops: DELETE FILE, SHELL COMMAND, PHONE CALL, SMS, UNINSTALL
User confirms YES/NO → execute_pending_action() OR rollback & notify
Safe operations bypass HITL (READ, SEARCH, CHAT, etc.)
2. SQLite FTS (memories_archive.db) → 3. ChromaDB episodic → 4. Graph triples (JSON)
1. session_memory.jsonl append → 2. SmartMemoryManager (RAM+SQLite hot) → 3. ChromaDB episodic ingest
4. Extract knowledge triples from response → 5. Ingest graph triples → 6. cognitive_profile update + drift detect
